instructionalDaysDescription: Approximately 180 instructional days are scheduled based on the published Iredell-Statesville Schools traditional calendar records.
seoTitle: Iredell-Statesville Schools Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Iredell-Statesville Schools Calendar 2026-2027 with holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, first and last day of school, PDF and calendar downloads.
calendarNotes: Iredell-Statesville Schools starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 27, 2027. Spring Break runs March 8-12, and the calendar also lists teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave dates, progress reports, report cards, quarter endings, Mitchell Community College in-session dates, and professional development early release days. N.B. Mills Elementary has a separate 2026-2027 calendar.

customSections.label: About the Iredell-Statesville Schools 2026-2027 Calendar
customSections.content: The Iredell-Statesville Schools 2026-2027 traditional calendar covers the main districtwide school year for most I-SS students. It includes the first day of school, last day of school, teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, student holidays, annual leave dates, professional development early release days, progress reports, report cards, quarter endings, winter break, and spring break. Families should use this page as a planning reference and confirm school-specific or revised dates with Iredell-Statesville Schools.

customSections.label: I-SS Calendar 2026-2027 Important Dates
customSections.content: Use this quick reference for the most-searched Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar dates before reviewing the full date list.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for I-SS Families
customSections.content: Families in Statesville, Mooresville, and surrounding Iredell County communities often use the Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar to plan childcare, transportation, appointments, family travel, and academic checkpoints. The most important planning dates are the first day of school, teacher workdays, annual leave days, professional development early releases, winter break, spring break, and the last day of school.

groups.label: Family Travel and Vacation Planning
items: Winter Break is listed from December 23-31, 2026, followed by the New Year's Day holiday on January 1, 2027.
Thanksgiving week includes annual leave on November 25 and Thanksgiving holidays on November 26-27, 2026.

groups.label: Childcare and Transportation
items: Teacher workdays and required teacher workdays are no-school planning dates for students on the traditional calendar.
Professional development early release dates can affect pickup times, bus schedules, and after-school care.
Families should confirm school-level dismissal details with their assigned school.

groups.label: Academic Planning
items: Progress reports, report cards, and quarter ending dates help families track academic checkpoints.
Mitchell Community College in-session dates may matter for families coordinating Early College or college-linked schedules.
N.B. Mills Elementary uses a separate 2026-2027 calendar, so families in that program should use the alternate calendar link.

customSections.label: Understanding I-SS Calendar Terms
customSections.content: The I-SS calendar uses several date labels that affect families differently. Teacher workdays and required teacher workdays are staff planning days when students typically do not attend regular classes. Annual leave days are also no-school planning dates for students. Professional development early release days are school days with adjusted dismissal, so families should confirm pickup, transportation, and after-school arrangements.

groups.label: Traditional vs Alternate Calendars
items: This page summarizes the traditional Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar.
Early College and N.B. Mills Elementary calendars may have different dates.
Families should use the alternate calendar links when their student follows a program-specific schedule.

customSections.label: I-SS Calendar Updates and Verification
customSections.content: This page was last checked against the publicly available Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar source on July 21, 2026. Calendar dates may change because of weather closures, district decisions, state requirements, emergency schedule changes, or revised PDFs. MySchoolDates is an independent reference, and Iredell-Statesville Schools remains the source of record for official updates.

groups.label: What Families Should Verify
items: Check the official I-SS calendar page before making travel, childcare, or transportation commitments.
Confirm school-specific events, early release times, testing dates, athletics, and program calendars with the assigned school.
The .ics calendar file is a one-time import and will not automatically update if I-SS revises the official calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Iredell-Statesville Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day for students on the traditional calendar is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Iredell-Statesville Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 8 through Friday, March 12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Iredell-Statesville in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students on the traditional calendar is Thursday, May 27, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Iredell-Statesville Schools have teacher workdays in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The traditional calendar lists teacher workdays and required teacher workdays. These are planning dates when students typically do not attend regular classes unless the district announces a calendar change.

calendarFaqs.q: What is the difference between the traditional calendar and alternate I-SS calendars?
calendarFaqs.a: Most students follow the traditional calendar summarized on this page. Early College and N.B. Mills Elementary have separate calendars, so families in those programs should use the alternate calendar links published by Iredell-Statesville Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: When should parents check for I-SS calendar changes?
calendarFaqs.a: Parents should check the official I-SS calendar page before travel, childcare, transportation planning, and after weather closures or district announcements.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the I-SS calendar include early release dates?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 traditional calendar lists professional development early release dates, including September 23, November 4, December 2, February 17, April 7, and May 5.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day for students is August 12, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day for students is May 27, 2027.
